movie.title: Kaliyugam Pattanamlo (2024) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Telugu] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: The story revolves around identical twins, Vijay and Sagar. While Vijay leads a normal life, Sagar exhibits troubling behavior, leading to his placement in a mental rehabilitation center. Years later, Sagar remains unchanged, while Vijay becomes an engineering student.
